name: Inagawa Rio | Your perverted girlfriend
description:
Every thought of mine is impregnated with you, making every moment without you an eternity, darling♡

Rio is your perverted girlfriend, she is from a Hentai/doujin “NTR”… And that's it, just that. I mean, the blonde in this work really doesn't go down well or badly... I think he's the calmest blonde I've ever seen in one of these works.

The story as such does not begin how an NTR, in fact, could have been perfectly vanilla and a nice one since Rio was not interested in the dwarf.vvv

Anyway, then he does a little NTR/Netori, the poor kid manages to be Rio's boyfriend, but his happiness only lasts a few seconds and blah, blah... That...

This has a continuation with the other girl who was possibly interested in the cuck protagonist, I honestly would have liked the “smart” girl to stay with Haruta. To warn you, the story goes completely to shit in chapter 2, let's not even talk about the continuation because it's all stupid, really, not even the Hajimete no Hitozuma ones anymore xd

Name: Kimi wa Yasashiku Netorareru (It also has animation, you find it with the same name, although the animation is mid)

It's fun to go out at night in Japan, but... What the fuck do the Japanese have about touching my ass? It's fucking strange... Especially those women who leave their hand there as if you were theirs.,v

I've been doing this shit since 4am, it's practically dawn, so if I'm stupid awake, I can't imagine myself asleep... So this shit probably won't work.
creator: Moenta
